version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/lUj1Wjs7Hdg.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
A BAR SONG (TIPSY)
As recorded by Shaboozey
(2024 release)


Capo 2nd fret



[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C/G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
My baby want a Birkin, she's been tellin' me all night long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Gasoline and groceries,  list goes on and on[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C/G[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
This 9 to 5 ain't workin', why the hell do I work so hard?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I can't worry 'bout my problems, I can't take 'em when I'm gone[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C/G[/ch]
One, here comes the two, to the three, to the four[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Tell 'em "Bring another round", we need plenty more[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
Two steppin' on the table, she don't need a dance floor[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Oh my, good Lord[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Someone pour me up a double shot of whiskey[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
They know me and Jack Daniels got a history[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Therе's a party downtown, near 5th Street[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gеttin' tipsy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C/G[/ch]
I been Boozey since I left, I ain't changin' for a check[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Tell my ma, I ain't forget (Oh, Lord, uh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C/G[/ch]
Woke up drunk at 10 a.m., we gon' do this shit again[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Tell your girl to bring a friend (Oh, Lord)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C/G[/ch]
One, here comes the two, to the three, to the four[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Tell 'em "Bring another round", we need plenty more[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
Two steppin' on the table, she don't need a dance floor[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Oh my, good Lord[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Someone pour me up a double shot of whiskey (A double shot of whiskey)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
They know me and Jack Daniels got a history (We go way back)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Therе's a party downtown, near 5th Street[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gеttin' tipsy (Woo)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy (At the bar gettin' tipsy)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C/G[/ch]
One, here comes the two, to the three, to the four[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
When it's last call and they kick us out the door[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
It's gettin' kind of late but the ladies want some more[/tab]
N.C.
Oh my, good Lord (Tell 'em drink some more)


[Chorus]
N.C.
Someone pour me up a double shot of whiskey (A double shot of whiskey)
N.C.
They know me and Jack Daniels got a history (Way back)
N.C.
There's a party downtown, near 5th Street (Come on)
N.C.
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy (Woo)
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Someone pour me up a double shot of whiskey (A double shot of whiskey)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
They know me and Jack Daniels got a history (History)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
At the bottom of a bottle gon' miss me (Bet you gon' miss me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy (At the bar gettin' tipsy)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           N.C.
Everybody at the bar gettin' tipsy[/tab]


[Outro]
N.C.
That's fuckin' messed up, bro, they kicked me out the bar
